mapper.update:
update cmp_marginworkbench
marginavailablebalance = marginavailablebalance + #{marginAvailableBalance}, natmarginavailablebalance = natmarginavailablebalance + #{natMarginAvailableBalance},
payamount = payamount + #{payAmount}, natpayamount = natpayamount + #{natPayAmount},
retrieveamount = retrieveamount + #{retrieveAmount}, natretrieveamount = natretrieveamount + #{natRetrieveAmount},
receivedamount = receivedamount + #{receivedAmount}, natreceivedamount = natreceivedamount + #{natReceivedAmount},
returnamount = returnamount + #{returnAmount}, natreturnamount = natreturnamount + #{natReturnAmount},
conversionamount = conversionamount + #{converAmount}, natconversionamount = natconversionamount + #{natConverAmount},
marginbalance = marginbalance + #{marginBalance}, natmarginbalance = natmarginbalance + #{natMarginBalance},
ytenant_id = #{ytenant_id}
id = #{id} and ytenant_id = #{ytenant_id}
